label: Fantasy
premise: A reluctant river-mage must escort a stolen crown through a kingdom where every bridge remembers who has lied on it.
seedPrompt: Focus on ancient bargains, clever companions, and choices with social consequences.

label: Cyberpunk Mystery
premise: A memory auditor in a vertical city investigates a murder where the victim keeps appearing in corrupted security footage recorded tomorrow.
seedPrompt: Use cyberpunk atmosphere, clue tracking, corporate pressure, and branching suspect interviews.

label: Romance Drama
premise: Two former rivals inherit neighboring orchard houses and must plan one final harvest festival while old betrayals and unfinished feelings surface.
seedPrompt: Keep the stakes personal, dialogue-rich, and focused on trust, vulnerability, and repair.

label: Horror Survival
premise: A storm traps a volunteer rescue team in an abandoned mountain shelter where the radio repeats voices from people not yet missing.
seedPrompt: Track limited supplies, rising dread, difficult tradeoffs, and avoid cheap jump scares.

label: Political Thriller
premise: A junior minister discovers a sealed coalition agreement proving the next election has already been traded away by every major party.
seedPrompt: Emphasize leverage, public trust, backroom negotiations, and irreversible political choices.
